title: Gemini
description: Topics referred to by the same term
extract:
Gemini most often refers to:Gemini (constellation), one of the constellations of the zodiac
Gemini (astrology), an astrological sign
Gemini, series of large language models developed by Google
Google Gemini, chatbot
extract_html:
Gemini most often refers to:

  • Gemini (constellation), one of the constellations of the zodiac
  • Gemini (astrology), an astrological sign
  • Gemini, series of large language models developed by Google
    • Google Gemini, chatbot
